basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist, Programmer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Research Scientist II (Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II (Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Research Scientist II (Medical): 25-40 years, Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): 18-35 years, Programmer: 18-35 years
age_limit.details: Research Scientist II (Medical): 25-40 years Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): 18-35 years Programmer: 18-35 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / BDS, (MD/ MDS or MBBS, PhD / BDS with MPH with PhD, Post Graduate Degree/ PhD in Biostatistic or B.E./B.Tech
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS / BDS with three years' post qualification research experience. OR MBBS/BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/ MDS (Community Dentistry)/MPH) OR MBBS, PhD / BDS with MPH with PhD. Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree/ PhD in Biostatistics OR demography. Desirable: Experience in Demography studies. Experience in managing large cohorts. Programmer: Master's degree in Computer Application / Information Technology / Computer Science from a recognized Institution/University/Institute OR B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering / Computer Science / Computer Technology / Information Technology from a recognized institution/university with organization. Desirable: Excellent command on Express/FastAPI, Flutter, PostGresQL, Ubuntu. Experience in REST API development, Offline First workflows, data collection, management, and analysis. Experience in MVC application development. Two years' experience in relevant areas of hands on in Express / Python / Flutter programming in Government, autonomous, PSU etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment is 02-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Research Scientist II (Medical) post. In total, AIIMS Delhi is recruiting for 3 posts across different categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Programmer post?
faq.answer: For the Programmer post, a Master's degree in Computer Application/Information Technology/Computer Science or a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering/Science/Technology/Information Technology is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this AIIMS Delhi recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Project Research Scientist II (Medical) post is between 25 to 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these positions ranges from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 1,04,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any geographical restrictions for applicants. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from all regions are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
